title: Personal Reader State, Idempotent Commands, Bulk Results, and Conflicts · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A disability-led research network incrementally builds consistent private reader-state service from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and browser fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, HTTP-client, Express, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, async-cleanup, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of consistent private reader-state service while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory…
objectives: Model read, unread, star, hide, save, tag, and note relationships by principal, tenant, and entry without changing shared content.
Accept explicit desired state with idempotency and optional version preconditions instead of ambiguous toggles.
Define bounded atomic or per-item bulk behavior with authorization, typed results, retry identity, and complete reconciliation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Personal State Scope
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 7069 during a PostgreSQL lease and migration fault exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove private reader state, idempotent desired commands, bulk results, conflicts, and count repair; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model read, unread, star, hide, save, tag, and note relationships by principal, tenant, and entry without changing shared content.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Personal State Scope.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model read, unread, star, hide, save, tag, and note relationships by principal, tenant, and entry without changing shared content. For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Personal State Scope, keep Feed Ts Personal State Scope connected to executable TypeScript unknown-validation, async, PostgreSQL, Express, reader, package, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
